perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a floral dress and a black jacket, stands outdoors holding an umbrella. She smiles and speaks directly into the camera in a selfie-style shot. Behind her, a traditional Chinese temple with intricate roof carvings and colorful decorations is visible. (2) She continues speaking, her expression shifting from a confident smile to a slightly embarrassed or playful smirk. A person on a scooter passes by in the background. (3) She finishes her sentence, looking into the camera with a lingering playful smile and a tilt of her head, maintaining a direct gaze.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a friendly and conversational tone. Ambient outdoor sounds include distant traffic and the low hum of a passing motorbike. (2) The vocal tone shifts slightly to a humorous or self-mocking inflection as she continues. (3) The speaking stops, leaving only the ambient city noise and the sound of the wind or movement until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '之前聽人家講' (Previously I heard people say). (2) Functional Text: '來台南一定要' (When coming to Tainan, you must). (3) Functional Text: '拜姻緣' (Pray for marriage/relationship). (4) Functional Text: '可是我來到這裡' (But since I came here). (5) Functional Text: '我又慫了' (I've chickened out again). (6) Decorative Text: '...' (Indicating a pause or awkwardness). (7) Functional Text: '怎麼辦' (What should I do?). All text is in white with a black outline, appearing as subtitles synchronized with speech.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video is a single, continuous talking-head shot where the creator speaks to the audience while standing in front of a landmark.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in focus; 1 blurred individual on a scooter in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, wavy dark hair, wearing a pink and white floral dress under a black zippered jacket, with sunglasses perched on top of her head.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional Taiwanese temple entrance with ornate, colorful roof decorations (dragons and deities), red lanterns, and parked scooters along the street.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight, slightly overcast or under shade.

landmark: Grand Matsu Temple (implied by Tainan/marriage context)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a relatable and humorous personal anecdote about the gap between one's intentions (praying for a relationship at a famous temple) and the reality of feeling shy or intimidated when actually arriving at the location. It serves as social engagement for her followers.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Selfie-style address to the camera with variety-style subtitles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the cultural context of Tainan's 'marriage' temples to convey its humor.
